title: Mhadei Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Mhadei Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Goa

overview.short: The Mhadei Wildlife Sanctuary is a 208.5-km2 (80.5-mi2) protected area in the Indian state of Goa in the Western Ghats of South India.
overview.description: The Mhadei Wildlife Sanctuary is a 208.5-km2 (80.5-mi2) protected area in the Indian state of Goa in the Western Ghats of South India. It is located in the North Goa District, Sattari taluka near the town of Valpoi. The sanctuary is an area of high biodiversity, and is being considered to become a Project Tiger tiger reserve because of the presence of Bengal tigers.

topPlaces.name: Brahma Temple, Bramha Karmali
topPlaces.description: Brahma Temple, Bramha Karmali, Goa (also known as Shri Brahmadav ji Temple) is located in the village of Nagargao, Valpoi, Goa, India. It is one of the few dedicated to Lord Brahma in India.

topPlaces.name: Valpoi
topPlaces.description: Valpoi or Valpoy (Vallpoi, pronounced [waːɭpɔj]) is a city and a municipal council in North Goa district in the Indian state of Goa. It is the headquarters of the Sattari Taluk.

topPlaces.name: Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, North Goa
topPlaces.description: Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, North Goa or locally known as JNV Valpoi is a boarding, co-educational school in North Goa district of Goa state in India. Navodaya Vidyalayas are funded by the Indian Ministry of Human Resources Development and administered by Navodaya Vidyalaya Smiti, an autonomous body under the ministry.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mhadei Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mhadei Wildlife Sanctuary is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mhadei Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Manohar International Airport, Mopa (North Goa) (38 km) and the nearest railway station is Madgaon Junction (Goa) (41 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mhadei Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mhadei Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mhadei Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Mhadei Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mhadei Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Brahma Temple, Bramha Karmali, Valpoi, Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, North Goa.
